questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto ramp_right at (4,3), ramp_right at (5,2), ramp_right at (6,3), landing on the bit at (5,4) which points right, directing the ball to the right side, then ramps continue to the right lever.

questions.question: What is the output pattern after running the machine?
questions.answer: The pattern is blue, red, blue, red, blue, red... alternating.

questions.question: How does the bit create the alternating color pattern?
questions.answer: The bit starts pointing right. Blue ball #1 lands on the bit, goes right to trigger the right lever, releasing a red ball. The bit flips to point left. Red ball #1 goes to the left lever, triggers blue ball #2. The bit flips again, and so on.
